events.title: Blue Lotus Ceremony​ - Kundalini Activation & Sound Healing
events.description:
Step into a sacred space where the veil between worlds grows thin. Join us for a transformative journey designed to awaken your connection to the Divine, illuminate your spiritual gifts, and remember the truth of who you truly are. Set against the lush, mystical backdrop of Ubud, this afternoon is an invitation to rise into your highest self, and let your soul's light shine through.

🫖 We open with a Lotus Tea ceremony to still the mind, purify the energy field, and invite a gentle yet profound state of receptivity. Blue Lotus has long been revered as a sacred plant medicine: a symbol of spiritual awakening, inner clarity, and the soul's journey from darkness into light. Its subtle calming yet euphoric properties soften the nervous system, quiet mental chatter, and tenderly open the Heart, allowing divine energy to move through you with ease and grace.

💫 Then, you will receive a direct transmission of Kundalini energy: your innate, divine and healing life force, activating deep transformation in your body and nervous system for powerful emotional and spiritual healing.

This awakening clears energetic blockages, balances your energy centers, boosts confidence, enhances vitality, and often leads to growth in areas like finances and relationships, while fostering a lasting sense of inner peace, harmony, and joy.

😌 We close with a long healing sound journey, an immersive bath of sound washing through every cell, dissolving what no longer serves you and anchoring the new light you've called in. You will leave feeling held, renewed, and deeply at home in yourself.

✨ Benefits of the session:

- Release emotional, energetic and spiritual blockages, limiting beliefs and stored trauma

- Experience deep relaxation, bliss, inner remembrance and stress relief

- Align with your soul’s path, life purpose and authentic self

- Awaken and embody your highest potential

✨ How to prepare:

- Dress Comfortably: Wear comfortable clothing.

- Eat Light: A lighter stomach enhances sensitivity to the practice. Recommendation to fast or not eat for 3h before the session.

- Hydrate: Drink water before and after the session.

- Avoid Stimulants: like coffee, alcohol and other mind-altering substances, the day of the session and if possible 24h prior.

- Disconnect: Take a break from news, social media, and avoid conflicts.

- Open Your Heart & Surrender: Come with an open mind, let go and allow the energy to transmute what doesn’t serve you anymore.

🧘🏽‍♀️ Your facilitators:

You will be led through a powerful transmission of Life force energy followed by the restorative vibrations of a Sound Healing session, guided by 2 facilitators:

- Houda: Kundalini Activation Facilitator, Cacao ceremonialist & Yoga teacher

- Antonella: Sound healer and Life coach

📅 Event Details

Date: Thursday, 11 June

Time: 3-6pm

Bring a journal and a pen to capture insights from your higher self.

Ready to feel the bliss?

🌀 Book your spot now!

Invite a friend or share with someone who needs this space

events.title: Yin Yoga Heart Opening & Sound Healing
events.description:
Yin Yoga “Heart Opening” & Sound Healing

Step into a gentle evening of deep rest, emotional release, and inner balance through a nourishing combination of Yin Yoga and Sound Healing. This intimate gathering is designed to help you slow down, soften, and reconnect with yourself in a peaceful private healing space.

Guided by Krisna Dewi, the session will begin with calming Yin Yoga postures that gently stretch the body, release tension, and improve flexibility. As the body relaxes, healing sound frequencies from singing bowls and soothing vibrations will guide you into a deeper state of calm, helping restore emotional harmony and mental clarity.

This experience is perfect for anyone seeking relaxation, stress relief, emotional healing, or simply a quiet moment to reconnect with body, mind, and soul.

What to Expect

 
 Gentle Yin Yoga practice

 
 
 Deep relaxation and nervous system reset

 
 
 Healing sound bath experience

 
 
 Emotional balance and inner calm

 
 
 Cozy and intimate atmosphere

 

Event Details

Date: Monday, 8 June 2026

Time: 6.15 PM – 7.30 PM

Location: Private Home Healing Space

Capacity: Maximum 6 guests only

Please Bring

 
 Comfortable clothing

 
 
 A blanket

 
 
 Water bottle

 
 
 An open heart

 

Advance booking is required due to limited spots available. Join us for a soulful evening of healing, stillness, and connection.

events.title: Resonanz Ecstatic Dance  X  KIMUNDO
events.description:
RESONANZ - (ECSTATIC DANCE)

Movement. Music. Freedom. Devotion.

Thursday, 18th JUNE 2026

18:00 till 20:45

📍 Paradiso Ubud

Tickets: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

Location: https://goo.gl/maps/7Fhjr9K768ATLAua7

150K IDR ONLINE - 200K IDR AT THE DOOR – Limited to 50 people

RESONANZ is a weekly Contact to Ecstatic Dance in the center of Ubud —

Intimate, casual, and dance-focused, with an emphasis on quality music and sound.

This Week’s Curator: KIMUNDO

Kimundo is a musician, producer, and DJ crafting hypnotic journeys with elements of psychedelic downtempo, emotional movements, jazzy world music, and live handpan melodies. His skills are rooted in years of musical training, sound healing facilitation and psychedelic exploration. His sets are sonic journeys that create space for altered states and invite your body to move in novel ways.

Schedule

18:00 — Contact Jam (open to all, no experience needed)

19:00 — Resonanz Ecstatic Dance

20:30 — Sonic Savasana (ends by 20:45)

Community Agreements

✦ No talking / No phones

✦ Drug & alcohol-free space

✦ Respect others’ space — eye contact = clear “yes”

Congregating every Thursday at 18:00

Pre-book: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

events.description:
RESONANZ - (ECSTATIC DANCE)

Movement. Music. Freedom. Devotion.

Thursday, 11th JUNE 2025

18:00 till 20:45

📍 Paradiso Ubud

Tickets: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

Location: https://goo.gl/maps/7Fhjr9K768ATLAua7

150K IDR ONLINE - 200K IDR AT THE DOOR – Limited to 50 people

RESONANZ is a weekly Contact to Ecstatic Dance in the center of Ubud —

Intimate, casual, and dance-focused, with an emphasis on quality music and sound.

This Week’s Curator: DISTANT GRAND

Warm | Moody | Bass | Disco

DJ, producer, and composer Distant Grand weaves a moody tapestry of sub-bass, ethereal soul, and just the right touch of deep disco. His sets guide the dancefloor through a shared emotive journey, visiting the full spectrum,  joy, yearning, grief, euphoria, and surrender. Each set invites dancers into an ecstatic release, a space to lose and find themselves again.

After nearly two decades composing electronic music and performing across British Columbia’s festival circuit, Distant Grand now channels that experience into his DJ sets and neoclassical piano compositions. 

Once rooted in the wild landscapes of Canada’s West Coast, his sound reflects the rhythm of the place he comes from, moody, grounded, and full of movement. It’s music shaped by weather, wilderness, and years of dancefloors under open skies.

 

Schedule

18:00 — Contact Jam (open to all, no experience needed)

19:00 — Resonanz Ecstatic Dance

20:30 — Sonic Savasana (ends by 20:45)

Community Agreements

✦ No talking / No phones

✦ Drug & alcohol-free space

✦ Respect others’ space — eye contact = clear “yes”

Congregating every Thursday at 18:00

Pre-book: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

events.title: Resonanz Ecstatic Dance x UtaraMata x Tanaman Liar x Pakcik
events.description:
RESONANZ - (ECSTATIC DANCE)

Movement. Music. Freedom. Devotion.

Thursday, 4th June 2025

18:00 till 20:45

📍 Paradiso Ubud

Tickets: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

Location: https://goo.gl/maps/7Fhjr9K768ATLAua7

150K IDR ONLINE - 200K IDR AT THE DOOR – Limited to 50 people

RESONANZ is a weekly Contact to Ecstatic Dance in the center of Ubud —

Intimate, casual, and dance-focused, with an emphasis on quality music and sound.

This Week’s Curator: Utara Mata X Tanaman Liar X Pakcik

Utara Mata

*“When the world around me goes dark, I was shown to listen to the guidance of sound vibrations.

Sound to me is a doorway to life, a way to remember all that is — and that this mortal existence with all of its complexities are all worthwhile.

It’s how I navigate my inner landscapes, a way to express what cannot be said through language or semantics. To bring forward what has been silenced and what wants to be seen however bright, however dark.”*

— Utara Mata

Utara Mata finds inspiration in the unexpected — wild nature, ancient myths, dreamscapes, and the uncomfortable mundanity of the everyday. She weaves soundscapes, percussive details, old-world chants, and siren-like vocals that melt into lyrics and spoken poetry.

Beyond the stage, she is the voice of @muara.watersounds, offering therapeutic journeys through water, sound, and movement. She also sings devotional songs with the female Sufi Qawwali ensemble @ilahi.qawwali, bridging the mystical and the earthly with her voice.

TANAMANLIAR

Tanaman Liar is a plant sonic ambient unit based in Ubud, Bali. Formed in Ubud as an alter ego project of Suy, a member of the underrated post-ethnic experimental band Nayyamul, the project blends plant-generated music with contemporary and traditional instruments to create immersive soundscapes.

Using plant music devices, Tanaman Liar translates the bioelectrical signals of tropical Indonesian plants into meditative sound journeys. Their music explores frequencies, vibrations, and healing properties of sound, bridging nature and human consciousness. Their performances are an audio-ritual experience, merging organic plant tones with experimental and traditional Indonesian elements.

 

All music emerges from silence, to which sooner or later it must return." Yet silence itself is a sound—a sacred space where rhythm is born and returns. These are the resonant realms Pakcik.

With dynamic, percussive beats infused with worldly rhythms and electronic textures, Pakcik weaves a musical mythology that transcends boundaries. His sound bridges the primal and the progressive, inviting you to connect with your roots while expanding into uncharted territories.

Through his sets, Pakcik takes you on a journey that is raw, intelligent, and brimming with heart. His ethnic influences and intuitive playfulness open a sonic scape that challenges your edges, only to draw you back into a dance that is grounded, soulful, and unforgettable.

Schedule

18:00 — LIVE MUSIC CONTACT IMPROVISATION by UTARA MATA & TANAMAN LIAR

19:00 — Resonanz Ecstatic Dance

20:30 — Sonic Savasana (ends by 20:45)

Community Agreements

✦ No talking / No phones

✦ Drug & alcohol-free space

✦ Respect others’ space — eye contact = clear “yes”

Congregating every Thursday at 18:00

Pre-book: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

events.title: WABI-SABI Nights: The Soul of Japan
events.description:
Wabi-Sabi Nights: The Soul of Japan

 

Matcha Ritual  |  Ikebana  |  Calligraphy  |  Origami

Live Music  |  Studio Ghibli & Japanese Medicine Songs  

Japanese-Themed Dress-Up Competition (with a lovely gift)

July 7 | 6-8 pm

 🇯🇵 Feel Japan.

 

Music, ritual, creativity, and connection—

inspired by the spirit of wabi-sabi:

finding beauty in the simple, the natural, the perfectly imperfect.

—

Imagine this:

You step into a space with soft, welcoming, meditative live music—

gently taking you out of the busy mind and into a grounded rhythm.

Warm tea is served, helping your body relax, feel the atmosphere, and calm your nervous system.

Throughout the evening, you’ll be guided through a series of intimate cultural experiences:

🍵 A calming Matcha Ritual

🌸 The delicate art of Ikebana (flower arrangement)

🖌 The expressive flow of Japanese Calligraphy

🎐 A playful Origami moment

After the demonstrations, the space opens for you to explore.

Touch, try, create.

Let your hands move, your curiosity lead, and your senses awaken.

—

Let’s go deeper into the experience—

sing along to Studio Ghibli melodies and Japanese medicine songs,

allowing sound to open the heart and bring us together in a simple, joyful way.

—

👘 Dress-Up Invitation

Come in your own expression of Japan—

whether inspired by geisha, samurai, kimono, anime, ninja, or your own unique interpretation.

Show your Japanese soul and have a chance to win a gift from Sayuri for your creativity.

Ticket: IDR 150K

events.title: Tribal Fusion Dance Intensive with MARIAMA DEL MAR
events.description:
Tribal Fusion Dance Intensive with MARIAMA DEL MAR

The initial format is a 3-day intensive with 1.5-hour daily classes, ending with a short choreography performance.

This intensive is open level (no strict prior experience required — participants with different movement backgrounds are welcome). You will focus on developing a deeper language of movement to integrate into everyday life.

The work is structured through five layers:

— visual perception and observation

— embodiment through imitation and repetition

— technique (isolations, illusions, slides, core Tribal Fusion vocabulary)

— energetic states (exploring qualities such as softness, precision, instinct, fluidity, stillness)

— narrative layer, where choreography is learned through imagery and inner storytelling

Through this process, you will develop: 

— deeper body awareness and control 

— expanded movement vocabulary 

— ability to express emotions and inner states through dance 

— presence and confidence in movement 

— final embodied choreography performance

Mariama will integrate archetypal dimensions of movement, so dance becomes not only a skill, but a lived, embodied experience. The goal of these intensives is to expand body awareness, deepen expressive range, and develop the ability to embody different emotional and energetic states through movement.

Open level | 3 days

1.5h classes

Final choreography performance

Price: 1,500,000 IDR per person

events.title: Plant-based nutrition: what science says
events.description:
Plant-based nutrition: what science says

The speaker: Marc Oliveira (inst:@marco.poischiche)

Plant-based diets through the lens of nutrition science, long-term health, and real dietary patterns.

What does “plant-based” actually mean? How does it differ from vegan, vegetarian, pescatarian and flexitarian diets?

Then we’ll explore one of the most common questions around vegan nutrition:

If plant-based diets often show strong health outcomes in large studies, why are vegans so often associated with deficiencies?

To answer this, we’ll look at two major long-term studies: EPIC-Oxford and the Adventist Health Study-2, comparing different dietary patterns such as meat-eaters, vegetarians, pescatarians and vegans.

We’ll discuss what the research shows regarding body weight, cardiovascular health, diabetes risk, cancer risk, nutrient intake and common nutritional gaps.

The goal is not to say that veganism is “perfect” or that everyone should eat the same way.

The goal is to understand the strengths and weaknesses of a plant-based diet, why planning matters, and how to build a diet that is strong, complete, sustainable and health-promoting in the long term.

Discover the data behind the 2 longest studies about plant-based people

https://marcopoischiche.com

events.title: Revealing Someone's Soul in 1 minute
events.description:
Revealing Someone's Soul in 1 minute

with Miao Miao @oneminuteeyereading

What if you could understand someone's soul, business potential, or a child's needs in just 60 seconds?

Join Miao Miao, the Chinese founder of "One Minute Eye Reading," for a powerful, interactive 2-hour online workshop each week. It's a tool for finding the right business partners or life partners and understanding your children better. 

Miao Miao combines her academic background (Double Master's Degrees in Psychology & English) with her expertise as a Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) healer specializing in moxibustion to bring you this unique knowledge.

 

Workshop Themes & Schedule:

The workshop is structured across four revealing themes. You can enroll in the Full 4-Theme Package (IDR 900k) or pick the sessions that meet your specific needs.

Week 1: Personality Uncovered: Learn to instantly recognize a stranger's core personality traits.

Week 2: Emotional Pressure & Source: Discover the reasons behind someone's current emotional stress.

Week 3: Open Body Meridians (TCM Focus): Learn about the body's energy pathways as seen through the eyes, with an introduction to Moxibustion from China.

Week 4: Hidden Physical Pains: Understand the history of physical discomfort and pain someone is carrying.

 

Enrollment Options

 
 
 
 Option

 
 
 Price (IDR)

 
 
 Note

 
 
 
 
 Full 4-Theme Package

 
 
 900k

 
 
 Covers all four weeks

 
 
 
 
 Single Session (Walk-in)

 
 
 300k

 
 
 Pay on the day for one session

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Your Teacher: Miao Miao

 9+ years of research & development of One Minute Eye Reading.
 TEDx Speaker (2017).
 Author of two bestselling books.
 Over 5,000 practical readings conducted.

Ready to see the unseen?

Price: 300k. Buy 3, get 1 Free

events.title: Date Me at Sayuri
events.description:
DATE ME AT SAYURI

Sunday 10AM-1PM

Ready to meet someone new?

Do you believe in the power of true, open conversation? We DO.

 

 

Free-flow event to help you create new connections or go deeper. No host — just you and your openness.

Make the first step fun and easy with our Date Me Card Deck.

Let your curiosity lead the way, speak from your heart, and discover authentic connection and open doors to intimacy.

How It Works

1️⃣ Choose your heart — let people know your preference:

💗 Pink — interested in women

💙 Blue — interested in men

💗💙 Pink & Blue — open to all

2️⃣ Grab a conversation card deck

Use it to spark connection, curiosity, and laughter.

3️⃣ Ask & Connect

Find someone with a matching bracelet and start the conversation by picking a card!

When you’re done, please return the deck (by 3 PM latest).

Decks are limited — don’t hold one if you’re not using it.

Price: 50K

Includes a cacao shot + card deck rental

No hosts. Just you, curiosity, and good vibes.

“Date Me at Sayuri Cards” is a series of questions to help you start conversations, expand your mind, and create meaningful connections, playfully.

Ask questions and be curious — it’s the only way to truly get to know each other. Be honest and open to discovering a deeper connection with another person and with yourself.

Even if you think you already know each other, it’s important to keep the willingness to understand more deeply and relate to the people around you. Learn how to ask, listen, and understand.

Let your truth set you free, show your authenticity, and open doors to intimacy.

Play with friends, strangers, or by yourself!

events.title: DANCE FORRÓ! – Brazilian Partner Dance Class
events.description:
DANCE FORRÓ! – Brazilian Partner Dance Class

Saturdays • 5–6:30 PM at Sayuri Healing Food

with Anderson @andersonmendesrocha

Step into the joyful world of Forró, one of the most beloved partner dances of Brazil.

Born in Northeastern Brazil and carried by rhythms like xote, baião, and arrasta-pé, forró is more than just steps — it’s a warm, playful, and heart-centered way of connecting with others.

What is Forró?

Forró is a traditional Brazilian dance rooted in simplicity, rhythm, and affectionate connection.

It’s danced close, with soft steps and a gentle embrace that carries a story of community, culture, and joy.

Every movement invites presence — with the music, with your partner, and with your own body.

Whether you’re completely new to dance or simply curious to experience something vibrant and uplifting, forró is a beautiful place to begin.

What You Will Learn

This class offers a beginner-friendly introduction to forró and will guide you through:

 
 Basic steps and rhythm foundations

 
 
 Leading & following principles

 
 
 Partner connection and communication

 
 
 Flow, improvisation, and timing

 
 
 Classic forró variations

 
 
 Relaxed social dancing techniques

 

You’ll learn step-by-step in a warm and supportive environment where everyone moves at an easy, natural pace.

What Makes This Class Special

 
 No experience needed — absolute beginners are welcome

 
 
 No partner required — you can come alone or bring a friend

 

Here in Bali, forró has become a beautiful way to meet people, make friends, and celebrate life through dance.

Every class is full of smiles, good music, and the warm energy of a dance that belongs to everyone.

Who Is This For?

 
 Beginners wanting to learn a partner dance

 
 
 Anyone who loves Brazilian music and culture

 
 
 Dancers looking for flow and connection

 
 
 People who want a fun, social, heart-opening evening activity

 
 
 Absolutely anyone — forró is for everyone!

 

What to Bring

 
 Comfortable clothing

 
 
 Flat shoes or dance barefoot

 
 
 An open heart and a willingness to have fun

 

Join Us

Come dance, connect, and enjoy the vibrant spirit of Brazil here at Sayuri Healing Food.

Learn the basics, meet new people, and let the rhythm of forró guide you into movement, joy, and community.

We can’t wait to dance with you. 💛

events.title: Women’s Circle & Cacao Ceremony with Viktoria
events.description:
Women’s Circle & Cacao Ceremony with Viktoria

Every Monday  10am—12pm

A sacred space to return home to yourself

 

Join us for a heart-opening gathering — a women’s circle woven around the spirit of ceremonial cacao and the power of sisterhood.

Ceremonial Cacao from Sayuri Café — rich, grounding, and full of heart medicine — will guide us gently inward. 

 

Through intuitive sharing, embodied movement, oracle cards and heartfelt connection, you’ll be invited to meet yourself just as you are. Each circle carries its own unique theme and unfolds through intuition — shaped by the energy, stories, and hearts that gather. Together we come to slow down, to breathe, to feel and to remember what truly matters.

 

This is a space to express what’s true for you, to be seen and heard in your authenticity, and to remember that you are never alone.

 

Led by Viktoria — a nurturing and intuitive breathwork facilitator, women’s circle facilitator, retreat host & guide - whose work is devoted to creating spaces of warmth, depth, and safety. Her circles are known for the deep sense of belonging they inspire — places where women can release, reconnect and return to their truth.

 

This circle is for any woman longing to reconnect —

with herself, with others, and with the quiet beauty of being fully present.

 

You’ll leave feeling lighter, nourished, and inspired — open-hearted and deeply connected to yourself and the sisterhood that surrounds you.

 

Limited spots available — book your place and come as you are.

Tickets are available online and at the door.

Price: 150k with cacao

events.title: LIVE MUSIC SUNDAY NIGHT: Neo & Friends
events.description:
LIVE MUSIC NIGHT at SAYURI HEALING FOOD

Every night is different — different sounds, different people, different energy.

It’s a cozy space where music brings everyone together — to listen, to feel, to dance, to be part of it.

Come for the food, stay for the music.

Or the other way around.

Eat. Listen. Dance.

FREE Enterence

Sunday | 8-10 PM | Neo & Friends

https://www.instagram.com/neo_and_friend

Desert x Indonesian Fusion Neo is a multi-instrumentalist and instrument builder from Central Java whose music bridges worlds. Deeply inspired by traditional North West African craft and rhythm, he blends the raw, hypnotic sounds of the Sahara with the earthy melodies of Indonesian folk music.

Specializing in instruments like the Kora, Ngoni, Guembri, Balafon, and Djembe, Neo not only plays but also handcrafts each instrument with deep respect for its cultural roots. His journey led him to spend several months in Morocco, learning from master musicians and builders — an experience that deepened his connection to Gnawa music and traditional sound.

Neo’s music is a meeting of two landscapes: the wide-open pulse of the desert and the lush spirit of the islands.

Sayuri Healing Food, the main Tatami stage

FREE EVENT | EVERY SUNDAY

events.title: LIVE MUSIC SATURDAY NIGHT: Brazil Dance
events.description:
LIVE MUSIC NIGHT at SAYURI HEALING FOOD

Every night is different — different sounds, different people, different energy.

It’s a cozy space where music brings everyone together — to listen, to feel, to dance, to be part of it.

Come for the food, stay for the music.

Or the other way around.

Eat. Listen. Dance.

FREE Entrance

SATURDAY | 7-9 PM | BRAZIL DANCE

@luzdosolmusic

 

A Tropical Celebration in the Heart of Bali

Every Saturday night, Brazil comes alive in Ubud.

Led by Brazilian artist Luz do Sol, this vibrant live concert brings the warmth, rhythm, and joy of Brazil to the heart of Bali.

The evening begins with the sensual rhythms of forró, Brazil’s beloved partner dance — with a class just before the concert so everyone can join the fun.

Then the band takes you on a musical journey through Brazilian styles like baião, ijexá, and more.

The energy builds. The room moves. Smiles everywhere.

Come meet new friends, dance close, and feel the contagious joy of Brazil.

Enjoy authentic live music, beautiful people and pure Brazilian joy.

One of Ubud’s most loved Saturday night events.

Meet • Dance • Love

events.title: Myofascial Release and Yin Yoga Module 2: Neck and Shoulders
events.description:
Experience your body from a fresh, insightful perspective!  

People who suffer from back pain often also experience neck discomfort, are prone to headaches, and have tension in the legs. Many women experience back pain after cesarean section, even long after their wounds have healed. Understanding fascia helps us understand our bodies more holistically. Our head and neck are not separate from our waist; our abdominal muscles are closely connected to our back and waist. Fascia is a connective tissue composed of collagen fibers (among others) that connects all parts of our body into a functional whole. Caring for and nourishing fascia is key to a comfortable, more flexible, and pain-free body.

This immersive workshop integrates two powerful connective tissue (fascia) techniques: Myofascial Release (MFR) and Yin Yoga. By combining targeted triger point release with slow, contemplative poses you will learn to nourish the fascia system and tap into your body's natural healing potential. This practice is designed to alleviate pain, improve fluidity of movement, and deepen your understanding of functional anatomy and energy pathways. This workshop is designed for Yoga practitioners and non-practitioners, as well as general fitness enthusiasts.

 

MODULE II COVERS:

 
 Theory of fascia and myofascia (deeper dive)

 
 
 Theory of Myofascial Release (MFR) (deeper dive)

 
 
 Trigger points (deeper dive)

 
 
 Ball Therapy techniques (roll and release) for NECK and SHOULDERS

 
 
 Theory of funtional Yin Yoga (deeper dive)

 
 
 Yin Yoga postures for NECK and SHOULDERS

 
 
 Sequencing MFR and Yin Yoga for NECK and SHOULDERS

 
 
 Two hours of practice

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Eka’s mission is to bridge the East and West through the arts, meditation, and functional movement. He teaches Yoga and meditation internationally and has been a resident teacher at Bali’s leading yoga center, The Yoga Barn, for over 15 years. An experienced Craniosacral therapist, the Balinese native has a deep passion for anatomy, fascia, Yin Yoga, and bodywork. He has studied with Jo Phee and Joe Barnett, senior assistants to Paul Grilley (the founder of Yin Yoga), and has trained under leading fascia and anatomy experts such as Antonio Stecco, Jaap van der Wal, Gil Hedley, John Sharkey, Robert Schleip, and Daniel Keown. Outside of yoga, Eka holds a Master’s degree in Media from Scripps College of Communication at Ohio University and is a Fulbright scholar. In his free time, he enjoys singing with his band and baking.

NOTES:

 If you have any issues with online payments, please email bookings@theyogabarn.com or WhatsApp The Yoga Barn Hotline (+62) 811 3983 789  We're here to help!
 Registration and payment can also be made at The Yoga Barn Reception
 If you see ticket sales are closed for the Event, contact us by WhatsApp to see if there is still space available!
 For special class, workshop and night event, Children under the age of 10 are not permitted to join , there are NO EXCEPTIONS to this rule. Children ages 10-15 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian or sibling that is over 18

NOTES:

 If you have any issues with online payments, please email bookings@theyogabarn.com or WhatsApp The Yoga Barn Hotline (+62) 811 3983 789  We're here to help!
 Registration and payment can also be made at The Yoga Barn Reception
 If you see ticket sales are closed for the Event, contact us by WhatsApp to see if there is still space available!

Refund Policy:

If you are unable to attend this event, you are eligible for a full refund of the ticket price if you contact us at least 24 hours in advance of the published start time. Contact must be made via email to bookings@theyogabarn.com  or in person at The Yoga Barn reception desk. We are NOT able to process refunds for any reason if you contact us less than 24 hours prior to the published start time.  We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price.

Ticket Transfer:

Tickets are not transferrable to another person. The booking is only valid for the person whose name is printed on this ticket.

Late Arrival:

We recommend that you arrive 15 minutes prior to the start time. If you arrive after the published start time, you may be denied access and your booking will not be refunded.

Cancellation Policy:

If this event is canceled by The Yoga Barn prior to the start time, you are eligible for a refund of your ticket. We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price. Please be aware that refunds may take up to 30 days.
